description: Replace HEPA-FF-L2-07 and complete room requalification before returning the filling suite to routine operation.
linkedRootCause: HEPA filter replacement interval remained at 18 months despite trend evidence supporting 12 months.
verificationMethod: EM re-test and engineering requalification review

description: Review exposure windows for VAC-26-0518-A and VAC-26-0518-B and document QA product impact assessment.
linkedRootCause: Environmental excursion occurred during active filling operation.
verificationMethod: QA batch record and EM trend review

description: Review and correct affected material transfer records with QA data integrity assessment.
linkedRootCause: Second-person verification ownership was unclear during shift handover.

description: Assess returned complaint vial and retained samples from VAC-26-0419-C for visible particulate matter.
linkedRootCause: Visual inspection reconciliation variance was not escalated.
verificationMethod: Complaint sample assessment and retained sample review

description: Update supplier qualification file and attach current quality agreement confirmation.
linkedRootCause: Supplier file ownership was split between procurement and QA without a monthly review trigger.

description: Repair cold room alarm relay and perform documented alarm challenge test.
linkedRootCause: Alarm relay failure delayed escalation to weekend duty personnel.
verificationMethod: Alarm challenge and temperature trend review
